rationale: No qualitative change for Romania — Iran deal delay continues affecting energy outlook, Ukraine's energy strikes are continuation, no new Black Sea escalation.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt
top_events.summary: Ongoing uncertainty over Iran deal keeps European energy prices volatile. Romania, dependent on regional gas markets, watches closely for any resolution.

top_events.title: Ukraine to keep targeting Russian energy after hitting sea terminal
top_events.summary: Ukraine's strikes on Russian energy infrastructure near the Black Sea region are a continuation. Marginally relevant to Romania's Black Sea security environment.

top_events.title: New EU migration rules debated
top_events.summary: EU migration policy reform continues to be discussed; Romania as a transit and destination country has indirect interest but no new binding decisions announced.
